title: MyKinLegacy LRE Prompt Bridge Production Deploy
safetyChecks: Bridge code is deployed but disabled by default.
Only an exact single order number in LRE_IMAGE_PROMPT_ORDER_ALLOWLIST can select the LRE prompt.
Empty allowlist keeps old prompt behavior.
Multiple allowlist values disable prompt replacement.
PVE failure falls back to old prompt.
No payment, email, vault, Ops, or database schema behavior is changed.
nextStep: After deploy succeeds and allowlist is confirmed empty, Founder may create one fresh unpaid order, set LRE_IMAGE_PROMPT_ORDER_ALLOWLIST to that exact order number, restart required services, then complete Stripe test payment.
